---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill directory to be added to the RCS library
title: '[SKILL] '
labels: skill-proposal
assignees: ''
---

**Skill Name**
A slug-style name for the skill (e.g. `vector-db`, `rust`, `deep-learning`).

**Target Category**
Under which category should it live?
- `core-behaviors`
- `engineering`
- `ai-ml`
- `models`
- `business-product`

**Why is this skill needed?**
What specific capabilities, prompts, or API interactions does this skill guide? What are common errors agents make in this domain that this skill will solve?

**Proposed Instructions / Prompts**
Provide a draft of the key prompt instructions that will be placed inside `SKILL.md`.
- E.g. "When writing SQL for Postgres, you must do X..."
- E.g. "When designing vector search databases, ensure Y..."

**Example Usage Scenario**
Show how an agent will invoke or make use of this skill.
